name: Epsom Bath Salts
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup dried rose petals, finely crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the epsom salts and dried rose petals in a bowl.
2. Add the food coloring and fragrance oil, if using.
3. Mix all ingredients thoroughly until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a container for storage or use immediately to make your bath salts.
